name: skewOnScroll
purpose: Skew an den Scroll-Fortschritt gekoppelt — das Element neigt sich (skewY), waehrend es durch den Viewport scrollt (scrubbed).
template: gsap.fromTo({{target}}, { skewY: 0 }, { skewY: {{params.skewDegrees}}, ease: 'none', scrollTrigger: { trigger: {{target}}, start: {{trigger.start}}, end: {{trigger.end}}, scrub: {{params.scrub}} } });
